forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Sun protection 12:20pm to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog on the eastern slopes. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 12:30pm to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloud clearing. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost near the eastern border. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly clear. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending westerly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 20 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
The chance of morning fog. The chance of morning frost near the eastern border. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Sun protection 12:00pm to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

The chance of morning fog. The chance of morning frost in the west. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of the ranges, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Cloud clearing. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower east of Ceduna, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection 11:20am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Ceduna. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 11:40am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Areas of frost and patchy fog north of Coober Pedy in the morning. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming easterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Winds east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
